title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 88.617 - White way system defined
text:
88.617.  White way system defined. — The term "white way system" as used in sections 88.617 to 88.633 means the systematic arrangement of ornamental light posts, street arches, frosted and colored lights and globes and other illuminating equipment, conduits and all necessary apparatus therefor in a prescribed district.
(RSMo 1939 § 6962) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 6816
